# Brief: S4-D2 — mongo provider mirrors + recovered-CST pin

## Task

Mirror S4-D1 (`b1ffecafe`) in
`packages/2-mongo-family/2-authoring/contract-psl/src/provider.ts`: extract the inner
interpretation function in the `prismaContract` closure (wrapping
`interpretPslDocumentToMongoContract` with today's exact wiring); `load` delegates
bit-identically (mongo has no `applySpecifierDefaultControlPolicy` step — mirror what
exists, don't transplant sql-isms); `interpret(input, context)` = inner fn + empty
seeds, `notOk → failure.diagnostics`, `ok → []`, no disk, no `resolvedInputs`,
`document` accepted-unused. Source object typed `PslInterpretCapable`, zero casts.

Tests first, mirroring `provider.interpret.test.ts` from sql, using this package's
established context fixture pattern (check its test/fixtures first): guard narrowing
on real factory output; parity deep-equal (codes + spans, `sourceId` aligned);
clean-schema `[]`-vs-ok; malformed-but-parseable no-throw; seeds-exclusion.

**Plus (reviewer suggestion from S4-D1, adopted): one recovered-CST no-throw test in
BOTH providers** — a syntax-broken schema (e.g. unclosed model brace) fed through
`interpret`: no throw, diagnostics (or empty) returned. Add the sql twin to
`packages/2-sql/2-authoring/contract-psl/test/provider.interpret.test.ts` in the same
commit or a separate one, your call.

## Scope

**In:** `packages/2-mongo-family/2-authoring/contract-psl/` (src + test); the one
additional recovered-CST test in sql's `provider.interpret.test.ts`.
**Out:** everything else. Halt conditions from S4-D1 apply (interpreter throwing on
recovered input = surface, don't wrap).

## Completed when

- [ ] Mongo `load` + `interpret` share one inner function; `load` bit-identical
      (existing mongo provider tests untouched, green; `pnpm fixtures:check` zero drift).
- [ ] Mongo test suite mirrors sql's five + recovered-CST; sql gains the
      recovered-CST twin.
- [ ] Gates green: `pnpm --filter @prisma-next/mongo-contract-psl test` +
      `pnpm --filter @prisma-next/sql-contract-psl test` + both package
      typecheck/lint, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test:packages`, `pnpm fixtures:check`,
      `pnpm lint:deps`. Zero new casts.

## Operational metadata

- **Time-box:** 60 min. Halt: same as S4-D1.
